title: ClinicalTrials.gov Registry
description: Search and extract clinical trial data including safety endpoints, SAEs, and study design

tools.name: search-trials
tools.description: Search clinical trials by drug, condition, sponsor, or status

tools.name: get-trial
tools.description: Get full trial record by NCT ID

tools.name: get-safety-endpoints
tools.description: Extract safety and adverse event endpoints from a trial's outcomes module

tools.name: get-serious-adverse-events
tools.description: Get reported serious adverse events from trial results (requires posted results)

tools.name: compare-trial-arms
tools.description: Compare adverse event rates between treatment and control arms (requires posted results)
